operator: self-run baseline (fixtures authored the same day — regression floor, not an independent benchmark)

findings.evidence: legacyCsvExport defined, never called, not exported
titleCase exported; only slugify is required by main.js
stop() flips the flag but never clearInterval(this.timer)
early return on short read skips fs.closeSync(fd)
existsSync check separated from write by an await — TOCTOU window
forEach(async) callbacks unawaited; addAll returns total before updates
empty catch swallows write error; function returns true regardless
reports imported: rows.length even when rows were skipped (okCount ignored)
i <= items.length reads items[items.length].price — TypeError on every non-empty cart
parseInt NaN passes qty == null and qty < 0; NaN stored in cart
path.join(UPLOADS, name) with caller-controlled name — ../ traversal escapes the root
averagePrice + comment promise an average; reduce returns the sum
